"[2] 34.0683/117.3998 - I PHONE INVLD IN A TC NOTIFICATION RECORDING - OPEN LINE"
"[16] C75-214 ADV CT APX 50 FT CHAIN LINK FENCE DMG NEG IMM HAZ "
"[10] 75-S5 ADV 1185 TO ACCESS F/ FRONTAGE JEO 215 - WILL NEED FB"
